title: Small question
wikitext:
[]: Small question Post by Thamaker » Sun Oct 21, 2007 11:34 am Hey folks. I don´t know if anyone else as asked this before, if so, please lock this up (and lock it up good ) .... Anyways..my question is for those who already seen 1.0 (lucky bastards..). Rebember from ep.1 in the series when Shinji arrives at the city, when he´s making a phone call, and when he hungs up, we see Rei? Well..does she appear in 1.0 aswell in the same scene? (enters theoretical mode) If she does, it makes sense that we´re gonna see her again in the end of 4.0 right? But with the new ending and all, could this scene have a different meaning? I´ve always considered to myself that this scene is like, the starting point of Shinji´s journey, and in EoE, the finnish line. So, if anyone knows the answer, plz share your wisdom with us .

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Oct 21, 2007 12:46 pm Good question, actually! I don't think I've seen an answer either. (btw: 500th post! )

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Oct 21, 2007 12:48 pm It has been answered, though I don't remember where. Yes, she does appear at the same time and place.

[]: Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 21, 2007 2:19 pm See the Rebuild 1.0 reviews spoilers thread. And yes, she does appear, I even noted it in my transcript of the movie: http://www.tesuji.org/japan_2007/rebuild_timestamps.txt wrote: 00:01:10 Rei in the street

Anyways..my question is for those who already seen 1.0 (lucky bastards..). Rebember from ep.1 in the series when Shinji arrives at the city, when he´s making a phone call, and when he hungs up, we see Rei? Well..does she appear in 1.0 aswell in the same scene? (enters theoretical mode) If she does, it makes sense that we´re gonna see her again in the end of 4.0 right? But with the new ending and all, could this scene have a different meaning? I´ve always considered to myself that this scene is like, the starting point of Shinji´s journey, and in EoE, the finnish line. So, if anyone knows the answer, plz share your wisdom with us .
